cards.back: Algorithm used to detect deadlocks, such as Banker's Algorithm or Peterson's Algorithm
Method of handling deadlock by terminating one or more processes involved in the deadlock
Method of handling deadlock by rolling back the processes involved in the deadlock to a previous consistent state
Method of handling deadlock by preemting the resources held by the deadlocked processes and allocating them to other processes
Method of handling deadlock by giving a higher priority to the process holding the resource causing the deadlock, allowing the deadlock to be resolved
